content: 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory systems can be reframed to use the intrinsic reward structures of ICM/RND curiosity-driven reinforcement learning to prioritize which unlabeled environmental interactions get stored as long-term episodic memory, rather than just prioritizing which unlabeled data points get labeled for model fine-tuning. This creates a curious active learning agent that actively explores uncharted state spaces to fill critical gaps in its episodic memory for planning, rather than just statically sampling from a given dataset.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
